overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character leading a horse along a dirt trail beside a lake. The character encounters another rider on horseback in a natural rocky wilderness setting with partly cloudy skies.

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by rope along a narrow dirt trail beside the water

notable_agents.action: brown and white horse being led by rope, walking alongside ego

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with moss and lichen covering the surface
calm lake or river visible beyond the trail edge
narrow dirt path winding through grass and rocks
deciduous trees with green foliage on the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail beside a lake, leading a horse by rope. A large rocky cliff face dominates the left side while scattered trees line the path ahead under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: another rider on horseback appears stationary on the trail ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse while approaching and passing another rider on the trail

notable_agents.action: horse being led by ego, maintaining steady pace
rider wearing light colored clothing sitting stationary on horseback

entered.detail: character on horseback waiting on the trail ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, another rider on horseback comes into view ahead. The character approaches and passes the stationary rider while maintaining hold of the lead rope, with the lake still visible to the right and rocky terrain to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a lakeside trail that transitions from a solitary walk into a brief encounter with another traveler. It begins with the character leading a horse by rope along a dirt path, flanked by a towering rocky cliff on the left and the shimmering lake to the right under a partly cloudy sky. As the character advances through the scattered trees lining the route, the perspective shifts to reveal another rider on horseback stationed ahead. The camera then maintains its forward momentum, passing the stationary rider while the rugged terrain and waterfront continue to frame the journey.
